overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing nighttime exploration in a dense forest. The player observes a misty river from a rocky overlook before equipping a torch and proceeding along a narrow dirt path illuminated by the flame.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook above misty river valley

events.description: moon becomes visible as a bright disc in the night sky
red glowing light appears briefly in the distant sky above the forest
character raises unlit torch into the frame, preparing to light it

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge surveying the dark misty valley below

entered.detail: white mist hovering over dark water in the valley below, barely visible in the darkness
silhouetted treetops forming a dark wall against the night sky
dense forest covering the hillside opposite the river
moss-covered rocky cliff edge where the character stands
wooden torch held in right hand, unlit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark nighttime scene at a forest overlook. The camera surveys a misty river far below in the valley, surrounded by dense forested hills. A brief red light appears in the sky, and the character raises an unlit torch into view, preparing to illuminate the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rocky outcrops and dense undergrowth

events.description: torch ignites with a flame, casting warm orange light on the immediate surroundings
character begins walking forward along the forest path, leaving the overlook

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow forest trail, using the torch to illuminate roots and rocks on the path

entered.detail: narrow winding trail covered with dry leaves, dirt, and exposed roots
massive moss-covered boulder flanking the right side of the trail
thick ferns and bushes lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The torch ignites and the character proceeds along a narrow dirt trail into the dense forest. The warm flame illuminates the immediate path, revealing large rocks and thick undergrowth on either side. The misty river and open overlook are left behind as the scene becomes enclosed by trees and vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, dark overlook of a misty valley into the claustrophobic depths of a dense forest. It begins by surveying a river far below amidst forested hills under a night sky, where a brief red light flashes before an unlit torch is raised into the frame. As the torch ignites, the perspective shifts from the open vista to a narrow dirt trail, with the warm glow of the flame carving a path through the darkness. The scene then closes in as the camera moves away from the overlook, leaving the river behind to be enveloped by thick undergrowth and large rocks. Finally, the environment transforms into an enclosed woodland corridor where the flickering light is the only guide through the heavy vegetation.
